backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend with data types and CRUD operations for memories, quotes, fun facts, and messages, plus a passphrase verification function using the hardcoded code 'Nobita'.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (BGM fix, click sounds, audio file audit) to their relevant source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for all components, pages, hooks, and layouts in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Doraemon Secret World' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main TanStack Router setup defining all application routes under a RootLayout that applies the star background, floating music control, global double-knock sound hook, and authentication guards.
frontend/src/components/FloatingMusicCon: Fixed bottom-right floating UI component with play/pause toggle and expandable volume slider, consuming the useBGM hook to reflect and control background music state.
frontend/src/components/GlassPanel.tsx: Reusable glassmorphism card component supporting Doraemon-themed neon glow border colors, optional float animation, hover lift effect, and a custom style prop.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main application layout with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation bars, and a logout handler. Renders child routes via an `<Outlet>` and highlights the active nav item based on the current path.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Fixed decorative background component that renders 80 randomly positioned twinkling stars and 8 floating bubbles using memoized arrays and CSS custom property animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, keyed by the user's identity principal. Invalidates and refetches all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBGM.ts: Custom hook that manages looping background music playback from a local audio file, attempting autoplay on mount and falling back to the first user interaction. Exposes play, pause, togglePlay, and setVolume controls along with current playback state.
frontend/src/hooks/useClickSound.ts: Custom hook that synthesizes a Doraemon-style two-note bell chime via the Web Audio API on every global click and touchstart event, throttled to 120ms. No external audio file is required.
frontend/src/hooks/useDoubleKnockSound.t: Custom hook that plays a pre-loaded 'Double Knock' audio file from a pool of three Audio instances on every global click and touchstart, throttled to 120ms. Cleans up all audio instances on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication via `AuthClient`. Exposes identity, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including CRUD operations for memories, quotes, fun facts, and messages, plus a code-verification mutation. Each hook uses `useActor` to obtain the backend actor and invalidates relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a Doraemon-themed design system with OKLCH color tokens, Tailwind directives, glassmorphism utilities, neon glow effects, and custom Google Fonts imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat page where users can send messages and receive bot responses from a 'Nobita' character, with typing indicators, quick-reply buttons, and audio playback on load.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero Doraemon image and a grid of navigation portals to all app sections, with BGM control and data seeding on mount.
frontend/src/pages/FriendshipPage.tsx: Page showcasing Nobita and Doraemon friendship quotes in animated, scroll-triggered glass panels with alternating slide-in transitions.
frontend/src/pages/games/ExamQuizPage.ts: A 10-question Doraemon trivia quiz game where the player answers multiple-choice questions and tries to beat Nobita's score of zero. Tracks answers, score, and displays a results screen with percentage on completion.
frontend/src/pages/games/GadgetClickerPa: A 30-second timed clicking game where emoji gadgets spawn at random positions and disappear if not clicked in time, tracking score and missed gadgets.
frontend/src/pages/games/MazePage.tsx: A maze game that procedurally generates a 15x11 grid maze using recursive backtracking, allowing keyboard (WASD/arrow keys) navigation from top-left to bottom-right while tracking moves and elapsed time.
frontend/src/pages/games/MemoryMatchPage: A memory card matching game with 24 shuffled emoji cards where players flip pairs to find matches, tracking moves, matches, and elapsed time until all pairs are found.
frontend/src/pages/games/SlidingPuzzlePa: A 3x3 sliding puzzle game with emoji tiles that shuffles the board and lets players click adjacent tiles to slide them into the empty space, tracking moves and time until solved.
frontend/src/pages/games/WhackADoraemonP: A 30-second whack-a-mole style game on a 9-hole grid where emoji characters pop up briefly and players click them for points, with a combo multiplier for consecutive hits.
frontend/src/pages/GamesPage.tsx: Games hub page listing six Doraemon-themed mini-games as clickable cards with descriptions, badges, and navigation to individual game routes.
frontend/src/pages/LockScreen.tsx: A lock screen page that prompts the user for a code, verifies it via a mutation hook, plays a sound on success, and redirects to the dashboard. Includes floating emoji decorations and orbiting star animations.
frontend/src/pages/MemoriesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of memory cards fetched from the backend and provides a form to add new memories with a title, content, and date. Uses GlassPanel components with red glow styling.
frontend/src/pages/OurMemoriesPage.tsx: A photo gallery page that shows a curated subset of memory photos with captions, a lightbox viewer, and ambient background music that plays on page entry.
frontend/src/pages/QuotesPage.tsx: Shows a random inspirational quote and a random Doraemon fun fact fetched from the backend, with refresh buttons and auto-refresh on mount. Uses fade/scale transitions for card visibility.
frontend/src/utils/botResponses.ts: Implements a rule-based NLP chatbot engine with Nobita Nobi persona, containing categorized response pools (greetings, love, friendship, memories, etc.) and a random picker utility for generating in-character replies.
frontend/src/utils/seedData.ts: Provides static sample data arrays (memories, quotes, fun facts) with a Doraemon theme, typed against the backend interface, for seeding or demo purposes in the frontend.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom Doraemon-themed colors, fonts (Orbitron, Space Grotesk, Nunito), glow/glass box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording three existing fix features focused on repairing BGM playback, click/tap sound effects, and auditing all audio file references across hooks and pages to resolve broken sound playback.
